title: Srila Prabhupada Stories 2: Dog food, horse food and pig food
speaker: HG Chanchalapathi Dasa

and

and Prabhupada realized that actually these devotees are very untrained they're very new

a few months old devotee and then he asked Srila Prabhupada
can devotees of Krishna can we get married and Prabhupada said yes you can get married if you wish

Srila Prabhupada in Africa if a man has to get married he has to give money to the girls brides
father and so Prabhupada was hearing all those things it's like a opposite of a dowry system in
India right in a dowry system the bride's father has to give money to the bride groom and here it's
just the reverse opposite of this and so Prabhupada was understanding all of those things and then
after a little while of discussion on that then that African devotee asked Srila Prabhupada Srila
to surrender and I have become a devotee of the temple and if I have to get married will you give me

so Prabhupada said don't worry now
you be a good devotee and then when you want to marry you let me know I'll get you a very nice

that how these devotees require a lot of training exposure and he was very patient with them and
allowing them to go through all these kind of questions and such things
then a few days passed by and then there was going to be the installation of the Radha Krishna

long list of different tribes different people this is 5000 years ago at that time the different

if they take shelter of a devotee of Krishna they become purified so that was the prayer that Shukadeva
